daily_creative_genius_streak.description: Psychology of creative genius has Csikszentmihalyi's flow research, Wallas incubation model, biographical genius patterns across domains (Darwin, Einstein, Mozart, Curie). No streak app teaches this science daily. Headspace (1.46M reviews) and Fabulous (185K) occupy adjacent self-improvement space but neither touches creativity psychology. Ideal app: daily lesson on the science of genius with historical case studies, verified cognitive research, and practical application prompts.

daily_flow_state_streak.description: Mihaly Csikszentmihalyi's flow research is among the most cited in positive psychology yet no app teaches its science as daily micro-lessons. Brain.fm (28K reviews) and Focus@Will provide focus music with no educational content. The science: 8 flow components, challenge-skill balance, autotelic experience, neurological correlates, flow triggers across domains. ADHD community (1.2M) is an underserved high-WTP segment specifically seeking flow state tools.

daily_divergent_thinking_streak.description: Guilford's divergent thinking research, Torrance Tests of Creative Thinking, de Bono's lateral thinking, remote associates — scientifically validated creativity science with zero dedicated streak education app. Elevate (275K reviews) and Peak (89K) train math/language through games, not creativity frameworks. Design (1.8M) and creativity (98K) communities plus psychology overlap = 4.1M aggregate audience actively seeking practical creativity science.

daily_polymath_habits_streak.description: Biographical study of polymaths (Da Vinci, Newton, Leibniz, Franklin, Feynman, Tesla, Turing, Curie) through a psychological/cognitive lens has enormous untapped market. Blinkist (310K reviews) summarizes books but does not structure daily polymath lessons around cognitive habits and cross-domain synthesis. History (17.6M), productivity (1.56M), and self-improvement (2.1M) communities overlap = 21.3M aggregate with high interest and demonstrated WTP for biography/self-improvement content.

daily_creative_blocks_streak.description: Steven Pressfield's Resistance concept, Cameron's Morning Pages, perfectionism research (Burns, Hewitt), creative anxiety science — the psychology of creative blocks is well-researched but has zero dedicated streak education app. Writing (2.3M) and Art (4.1M) communities are ideal targets with acute pain points around block/resistance. Calm (2.1M reviews) occupies general anxiety space but not the specific psychology of creative resistance and block mechanisms.

daily_innovation_psychology_streak.description: The psychology behind disruptive innovation: T-shaped knowledge (Brown, IDEO), associative combinatorics (Johansson's Medici Effect), first-principles thinking, analogical reasoning, cognitive load and insight research. MasterClass (91K) and Coursera (153K) offer long-form courses; neither delivers daily micro-lessons on innovation psychology science. Business (3.9M), entrepreneur (2.7M), and startup (1.2M) communities total 7.8M with high demonstrated WTP ($50-200/mo learning budgets).

daily_musical_genius_streak.description: The neuroscience of musical genius: absolute pitch science (Zatorre), prodigy studies, Mozart effect properly debunked, Suzuki method neurological basis, music and memory (Thaut), amusia, emotional contagion in music. Simply Piano (218K reviews) and Yousician (150K) teach instrument skills; neither covers the cognitive science of musical intelligence. Music theory (1.5M) and psychology (2.14M) communities = 3.6M aggregate audience seeking deeper understanding of musical cognition.

daily_imagination_science_streak.description: Default Mode Network research, mental simulation science, episodic future thinking, counterfactual reasoning, imaginative buffer (Suddendorf), prospective cognition — active neuroscience fields with zero dedicated streak education apps. Headspace (1.46M reviews) covers meditation; Waking Up (58K) covers philosophy/meditation. Neither touches the science of imagination as a distinct cognitive faculty. Neuroscience (1.48M) and psychology (2.14M) communities actively discuss these topics.

daily_creative_problem_solving_streak.description: TRIZ (systematic innovation framework), SCAMPER, IDEO design thinking, biomimicry, SYNECTICS, lateral thinking puzzles — structured creative problem-solving frameworks used by top engineering firms with zero dedicated daily education app. Notion (120K) and Miro (87K) are tools, not educators. Engineering (1.8M), design (1.8M), and entrepreneur (2.7M) communities = 6.3M aggregate seeking structured creative methodologies with high professional WTP.

daily_cognitive_style_streak.description: Field dependence/independence (Witkin), holistic vs analytic thinking, verbalizer vs visualizer (Riding), sensory modality preferences — cognitive style science goes far beyond MBTI yet MBTI (640K subreddit) dominates. 16Personalities (42K reviews) and Crystal (8.2K) offer personality typing but not deep cognitive style science. Neurodiversity (410K) and ADHD (1.2M) communities represent underserved segments seeking science-based cognitive self-understanding beyond personality tests.
